positions_left_in_code.code: for (let py = 150; py < 340; py += 15) { dockGfx.strokeRect(dockX - 24, py, 48, 14); }
positions_left_in_code.reason: Loop-generated graphics for dock planks. The loop bounds (150, 340, 15) and rect offsets (24, 48, 14) are intrinsic plank geometry tightly coupled to the loop counter. Extracting the loop bounds to JSON would require also changing how the loop consumes them — a logic change. Left in code per rule 8 (loop-generated positions exempt unless trivially hoistable).

positions_left_in_code.code: for (let y = 40; y < 190; y += 30) { for (let x = 50; x < width; x += 120) { waterGfx.strokeEllipse(x, y, 40, 8); } }
positions_left_in_code.reason: Purely decorative animated-style ripple graphics generated entirely by loop. No single anchor; all positions are loop-computed. Left in code per rule 7/8.

notes: LakeEdgeScene (900x700) fully converted to data-driven layout.
